Hero.title2: Your Businesses, and Your AI Agents.
Hero.description: The complete compliance toolkit for companies building on the AVALANCHE® blockchain. Verify identities (KYC), businesses (KYB), and even AI agents (KYA) — all with one platform. Your users' data stays private. Always.

Home.testnetBanner: Fuji Testnet — This is a demo environment. Not for production use yet.
Home.howItWorksSubtitle: Your users go from zero to fully compliant in under 5 minutes — no paperwork, no waiting
Home.step1Desc: Your user connects MetaMask, Core, or any compatible wallet. No email. No account creation. Just plug and go.
Home.step2Desc: Need to verify a person? Choose KYC. A company? Choose KYB. An AI agent? Choose KYA. Each path creates a tamper-proof credential on-chain.
Home.step3Desc: The compliance credential is written directly on the blockchain. Any app on the AVALANCHE® network can check it instantly — no APIs to call, no databases to query.
Home.partnersSubtitle: We built KUMPLY alongside real banks, VCs, and fintech leaders who told us exactly what they need
Home.whyAvaxTitle: Why We Build on the AVALANCHE® Network
Home.whyAvaxSubtitle: The only blockchain that gives us sub-second speed, built-in privacy via eERC, and native cross-chain messaging — all in one
Home.whyF1Desc: The AVALANCHE® network confirms transactions almost instantly via Snowman consensus. When a regulator or smart contract checks a credential, the answer comes back in less than a second.
Home.whyF2Desc: If your app runs on Ethereum, it runs on the AVALANCHE® network. Add KUMPLY compliance with just a few lines of code — no migration needed.
Home.whyF3Desc: Issue thousands of compliance credentials for a fraction of what it costs on Ethereum. Perfect for companies verifying at scale.
Home.whyF4Desc: A credential issued on one AVALANCHE® L1 is readable on every other via Interchain Messaging (ICM). No re-verification. No bridges. One identity across the entire ecosystem.
Home.ctaSubtitle: Connect your wallet and see how fast you can issue a verified credential. It takes less than 60 seconds on our testnet.

Tiers.title: Compliance Plans
Tiers.subtitle: Choose the right level of verification for your users. Each plan matches a different regulatory need — from basic identity checks to full corporate compliance.
Tiers.tier1Desc: Email and phone verification. Great for apps that need simple identity checks or automated access control.
Tiers.tier2Desc: Government ID + liveness check. The go-to choice for trading platforms and fintech apps.
Tiers.tier3Desc: Full KYC with proof of address and source of funds. Required for high-value transactions and regulated platforms.
Tiers.tier4Desc: Corporate verification (KYB). Validates company registration, directors, and beneficial owners for institutional use.
Tiers.tier5Desc: Verify the AI agents and autonomous software operating on behalf of your company. The first compliance standard for agentic systems.

Verify.pageDesc: Connect your wallet to start the verification process. It only takes a few minutes.
Verify.pendingDesc: Your identity has been verified. We're now writing your credential to the AVALANCHE® blockchain. This usually takes 5–30 seconds.
Verify.doneDesc: Your compliance credential is now live on the blockchain. Any app on the AVALANCHE® network can confirm it instantly.
Verify.pollError: Your credential hasn't appeared on-chain yet. This can take a minute or two. Refresh to check.
Verify.launchError: Could not start the verification process
Verify.testnetWarning: Fuji Testnet only — not for production use
Verify.kycExplainer: Complete the identity verification below. Your personal data is processed securely by Sumsub and never stored by KUMPLY.

Developers.title: For Developers
Developers.subtitle: Add compliance checks to your app in under 10 minutes with our TypeScript SDK.
Developers.step2: 2. Check if a User is Verified
Developers.apiDesc: Live endpoint · attestation lookup · fee query
Developers.soliditySubtitle: Block non-compliant users at the smart contract level — one line of code

Network.title: Fuji Testnet
Network.subtitle: This is our sandbox environment. Use it to test your integration before going to production.
Network.faucetDesc: You need test AVAX® tokens to interact with KUMPLY contracts on Fuji. It's free — takes 10 seconds.
Network.addToWalletDesc: One click to configure MetaMask or Core for the AVALANCHE® Fuji testnet.

kyc.title: KYC — Verify People
kyc.subtitle: Identity verification that protects user privacy while keeping you compliant
kyc.p1: Your users prove who they are without handing over sensitive documents to you. KUMPLY handles the verification through a licensed provider (Sumsub), then creates a private, encrypted credential on the blockchain that only authorized parties can read.
kyc.p2: The result? Your users are verified. Your platform is compliant. And you never touch, store, or become liable for personal data. The credential lives as an encrypted token that cannot be transferred or forged.
kyc.f1Desc: All personal documents are processed by our licensed KYC partner. KUMPLY only stores an encrypted proof — not the actual data.
kyc.f2Desc: Each verified person gets exactly one credential. No duplicate accounts. No automated agents pretending to be people.
kyc.f3Desc: Government IDs from virtually every country, with real-time selfie checks to prove the person is actually there.

kyb.title: KYB — Verify Companies
kyb.subtitle: Corporate identity verification for institutional platforms and B2B onboarding
kyb.p1: When your platform needs to onboard a company — not just a person — you need KYB. KUMPLY verifies the company's legal registration, its directors, and its real owners (beneficial owners or UBOs). All automatically.
kyb.p2: Once verified, the company receives an on-chain credential that works everywhere on the AVALANCHE® network. Other platforms can trust that company without making them repeat the process.
kyb.f1Desc: We go beyond the company name. We verify who actually owns and controls the business — down to the ultimate beneficial owners.
kyb.f2Desc: Automated checks against OFAC, UN, EU sanctions lists, PEP databases, and adverse media — updated continuously.
kyb.f3Desc: Link verified directors to corporate multi-sig wallets. Every signer is a known, verified entity.

kya.title: KYA — Verify AI Agents
kya.subtitle: The world's first compliance standard for AI agents operating on-chain
kya.p1: AI agents are already trading, lending, and managing funds on-chain. But until now, there's been no way to know: who built this agent? Is it authorized? Is it compliant? KYA answers all of that.
kya.p2: KUMPLY links every AI agent to its verified human developer or corporate owner. Protocols can then decide: do I let this agent interact with my contracts? Based on real, verifiable compliance data — not just trust.
kya.f1Desc: Each AI agent is linked to a verified person or company. If something goes wrong, there's always an accountable party.
kya.f2Desc: Agents can earn reputation over time. Good track record? Higher trust level. Suspicious activity? Restricted access.
kya.f3Desc: Set rules: only allow verified agents. Block unregistered ones. Rate-limit suspicious activity. All enforced automatically on-chain.

cross-l1.title: Cross-Chain Verification
cross-l1.subtitle: One credential, valid across every AVALANCHE® network
cross-l1.p1: Imagine your user verifies their identity on an AVALANCHE® L1. Now they want to use a different app on another AVALANCHE® L1. With KUMPLY, they don't need to verify again. Their credential travels with them automatically through Avalanche Interchain Messaging (ICM).
cross-l1.p2: For developers, this means you can check compliance status on any AVALANCHE® L1 with a single function call. No third-party bridges. No external oracles. No waiting. It just works.
cross-l1.f1Desc: Uses Avalanche Interchain Messaging (ICM) — the AVALANCHE® network's native cross-chain protocol. No reliance on external bridges that add risk and complexity.
cross-l1.f2Desc: A single verified credential works across the entire AVALANCHE® ecosystem — C-Chain and custom AVALANCHE® L1s. No re-verification needed.
cross-l1.f3Desc: Check a user's compliance status on another network in real-time. Sub-second response, built into the transaction flow.

contracts.title: Smart Contract Integration
contracts.subtitle: Add compliance checks directly into your protocol — 3 lines of Solidity
contracts.p1: Our AttestationStore contract is the central registry where all verified credentials live. It's deployed on Fuji and ready for you to query. Think of it as a compliance database that lives on-chain.
contracts.p2: Want to block unverified users from depositing funds? Just add one line: require(kumply.getTier(user) >= 2). That's it. Your smart contract now enforces compliance automatically.
contracts.f1Desc: Simple Solidity interfaces that drop right into your existing contracts. No architectural changes needed.
contracts.f2Desc: Checking a user's compliance status costs almost nothing in gas. It's a simple storage read — no computation overhead.
contracts.f3Desc: Full test coverage. Open-source contracts. Third-party security audit in progress.

api.title: Cross-Chain API
api.subtitle: Query compliance data across any AVALANCHE® network from your backend
api.p1: Building on a custom AVALANCHE® L1? You can still check if a user is KUMPLY-verified on any other network. Our SDK handles all the cross-chain messaging for you.
api.p2: No need to understand Interchain Messaging internals. Just call our SDK functions and get a yes/no answer: is this user compliant? What tier are they? When does it expire?
api.f1Desc: Works in Node.js and browser environments. Install with npm, import, and start querying in minutes.
api.f2Desc: Subscribe to credential events — know instantly when a user gets verified, upgraded, or revoked.
api.f3Desc: Every response is cryptographically verified. You don't need to trust our servers — you verify the proof yourself.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we handle your data (short version: we don't keep it)
privacy.p1: KUMPLY complies with Mexico's data protection law (LFPDPPP) and follows GDPR principles. But here's the simple version: we are a software tool. We process your verification through a licensed partner, create an encrypted proof, and that's it. We don't store your documents.
privacy.p2: Your personal data is handled by Sumsub (our licensed KYC provider, SOC 2 Type II certified). KUMPLY only receives a pass/fail result and writes an encrypted credential to the blockchain. No names, no photos, no addresses on our servers. Ever.
privacy.f1Desc: We literally don't have your personal data. It's processed by our licensed partner and never touches our servers.
privacy.f2Desc: Verification only happens when you explicitly approve it by signing with your wallet. No hidden consent.
privacy.f3Desc: Want to remove your credential? You can revoke it at any time. Your right to be forgotten is built into the protocol.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The rules of the road — plain and simple
terms.p1: KUMPLY is software. We provide tools that help companies verify identities and store compliance credentials on the blockchain. We don't hold your money, we don't manage your investments, and we don't give financial advice.
terms.p2: You're responsible for how you use these tools. If you're a company integrating KUMPLY, you're responsible for setting up the right compliance rules for your jurisdiction. We provide the infrastructure — you define the policies.
terms.f1Desc: KUMPLY is non-custodial. We have zero access to your wallet, your private keys, or your digital assets.
terms.f2Desc: We're a technology provider. We don't need financial licenses because we don't perform financial activities.
terms.f3Desc: You decide which compliance tier to require. You decide who can access your platform. KUMPLY enforces what you configure.

regulatory.title: Our Regulatory Position
regulatory.subtitle: How KUMPLY fits into the regulatory landscape — clearly and transparently
regulatory.p1: The compliance world is complex. Here's where KUMPLY fits: we're a software tool that helps other companies comply with regulations like AML, KYC, MiCA, and FATF guidelines. We are not ourselves a regulated financial entity.
regulatory.p2: Think of us like the company that makes the cash register — not the store that uses it. We build the compliance infrastructure. Banks, fintechs, and DeFi protocols use it to meet their regulatory obligations.
regulatory.f1Desc: We're legally classified as a software infrastructure company. We don't custody funds, transmit money, or issue financial products.
regulatory.f2Desc: Our compliance rules are configurable. Need stricter checks for Europe (MiCA)? Different rules for Mexico (LFPIORPI)? Just configure your tier requirements.
regulatory.f3Desc: Built from day one to fit cleanly within existing legal frameworks. No gray areas. No regulatory risk for you.

audit.title: Security Audit
audit.subtitle: We take security as seriously as compliance — because they're the same thing
audit.p1: When you're handling identity credentials, security isn't optional — it's the product. That's why we're pursuing comprehensive audits of every component: smart contracts, encryption logic, and cross-chain messaging.
audit.p2: Our smart contracts are open-source and fully tested. We're currently working with leading blockchain security firms to complete formal audits. All results will be published here — full transparency, no exceptions.
audit.f1Desc: Formal verification and manual code review of all on-chain logic. Status: In progress.
audit.f2Desc: Independent analysis of our zero-knowledge proof circuits and the eERC (Encrypted ERC) implementation.
audit.f3Desc: After the audit, we'll launch a public bug bounty on Immunefi. If you find a vulnerability, you get paid.

Footer.brandDesc: The compliance toolkit for companies building on the AVALANCHE® blockchain. Verify people, businesses, and AI agents — all in one place.

Dashboard.title: Compliance Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Real-time view of all attestations issued on the AVALANCHE® Fuji testnet. Query any wallet and inspect credential status.
Dashboard.lookupDesc: Enter any EVM address to check its current compliance tier, issuance date, and expiry.
Dashboard.tierDistDesc: Distribution of issued credentials by compliance tier (last 10,000 blocks).
Dashboard.recentDesc: Last 50 attestations from on-chain events. Updates every 30 seconds.
Dashboard.noEvents: No attestation events found in the last 10,000 blocks.

Demo.title: See KUMPLY in Action
Demo.subtitle: Select a real-world use case and run a live compliance check against the AVALANCHE® Fuji testnet. No wallets required.
Demo.gateDesc: Every DeFi protocol, RWA platform, or AI marketplace can add one modifier to their Solidity contract that gates access by KYC tier. The check is instant, gasless for reads, and fully on-chain — no APIs, no servers, no trust required.
Demo.customDesc: Enter any wallet address and select the required compliance tier. The check reads directly from the deployed contract on Fuji.
Demo.solidityTitle: Add Compliance in 3 Lines of Solidity
Demo.solidityDesc: Copy this pattern into your contract. Replace the constructor arguments with the live KUMPLY addresses.
